purpose: Reference for Synapse's dark-first design system. Documents CSS custom properties for backgrounds, text, fonts (DM Sans, Space Grotesk), status colors (completed green, in_progress purple, pending gray, failed red, claimed lime, blocked orange), gradient accents, terminal/editor color palettes, glass morphism patterns, header gradient, JavaScript color constants in src/ui/utils/constants.js, runtime CSS-to-JS synchronization via initStatusColorsFromCSS(), UI constants, scrollbar styling, theme settings, and a customization guide.
gotchas: Status colors must match between CSS and JS -- runtime sync via initStatusColorsFromCSS()
Subpixel antialiasing intentionally disabled for thinner text on dark backgrounds
Currently only 'original' theme is implemented; customColors is reserved/unused
Dashboard labels derive dynamically -- legacy 'dashboardN' converts to 'Dashboard N', short hex IDs displayed uppercase
Electron BrowserWindow backgroundColor #0a0a0c must match CSS --bg to prevent white flash
patterns: CSS custom properties on :root, JS constants in src/ui/utils/constants.js, runtime sync
Glass morphism: rgba surface + backdrop-filter blur + subtle border
Hover effects with purple glow box-shadow
colorWithAlpha utility for alpha conversion across hex/rgb/rgba
conventions: Variables on :root, components reference variables not literal colors
Display font (Space Grotesk) for headings/numbers, sans (DM Sans) for body
STATUS_COLORS map keys: completed, in_progress, pending, failed, claimed, blocked
LEVEL_COLORS map: info, warn, error, debug, permission, deviation
